_instructor: Place this file at .vscode/mcp.json in your workspace. Walk through each server.

github._demo_note: DEMO 1: GitHub MCP — lets Agent read issues, create PRs from inside VS Code

filesystem._demo_note: DEMO 2: Filesystem MCP — let Agent read files outside the workspace (e.g., /tmp/logs)

postgres._demo_note: DEMO 3: Postgres MCP — Agent can inspect schema, suggest indexes, query data

playwright._demo_note: DEMO 4: Playwright MCP — Agent can open browser, take screenshots, generate E2E tests

sqlite._demo_note: ALTERNATIVE to Postgres if no PG available — SQLite works great for classroom demos
